metadata.description: Scala code intelligence tools for coding agents

plugins.name: scalex
plugins.description: Scala code intelligence for coding agents — search symbols, find definitions, find implementations, find references, explore imports. Works on Scala 2 and 3 codebases without a compiler or build server.

plugins.name: scalex-semanticdb
plugins.description: Compiler-precise Scala code intelligence from SemanticDB — call graphs, precise references, resolved types, flow analysis. Companion to scalex for compiled codebases.

plugins.name: scalex-intellij
plugins.description: JetBrains IntelliJ IDEA integration for coding agents — build, compile, run tests, inspections, semantic rename, and compiler-resolved code intelligence via MCP Server.
